C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc libHenigmaEngine.a CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/Include/Matematika/Matematika.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/Risalnik.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/CallBack.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/Buffers.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/NaloziTeksturo.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/Shaderji.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/Narisi.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/glad/src/glad.c.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Font/Font.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Scene/Scena.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Objekt/Objekt.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Ploscice/Ploscice.cpp.obj
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ranlib.exe libHenigmaEngine.a
